seoTitle: How to Fix Trello Login Page Issues
metaDescription: Troubleshoot Trello login loops and errors by clearing browser cache, testing in incognito mode, and recovering your Atlassian account.
intro: Getting stuck on a broken Trello login screen usually comes down to stale browser data or an unaligned Atlassian account, not a real account problem. This guide walks through the most common fixes, from hard refreshes to full account recovery.

steps.heading: Try a hard refresh first
steps.body: If the login page appears blank or stuck in a loop, perform a hard refresh using Ctrl+F5 or Cmd+Shift+R.

steps.heading: Clear your browser cache and cookies
steps.body: Go to your browser's privacy settings, find Cookies and Site Data, and clear any stale cached data for Trello.

steps.heading: Test in a private browsing window
steps.body: Open an incognito or private window and attempt to log in there to rule out extension or cache conflicts.

steps.heading: Log in through the Atlassian portal
steps.body: Enter your registered email, click Continue, and complete authentication through the Atlassian login screen, including any multi-factor checks.

steps.heading: Fix mobile app login loops
steps.body: On Android or iOS, check your app manager settings and clear the app's local data storage, then confirm your default browser is fully supported.

steps.heading: Recover your account if needed
steps.body: Use the account recovery portal to request a password reset link, then check your inbox and approve the security token to regain access.

faq.question: Why does my Trello login keep looping?
faq.answer: This usually happens because of stale session tokens stored in your browser cache, which a hard refresh or cache clear typically resolves.

faq.question: What if my mobile app won't log in?
faq.answer: Try clearing the app's local data storage in your device settings and make sure your default browser is supported.

faq.question: Why am I getting an 'Incorrect Email/Password' error even though I know it's right?
faq.answer: This is often caused by missing Atlassian migration sync details, and may require going through account recovery to resolve.

faq.question: How do I reset my Trello password?
faq.answer: Use the account recovery portal to request a reset link, then check your email and approve the security token to set a new password.
